description.value:
Growing up climbing trees in jungles and forests, you've strengthened your tail to carry equipment while using both hands.

Your tail functions like an extra hand. You can hold one extra hand's worth of equipment with your tail, and you can use your tail to perform Interact actions. Your tail can be paired with another hand when you designate your active hands with the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Switch Hands] action, and you can wield a shield or weapon in your tail when it's one of your active hands.

Additionally, you gain a climb Speed equal to your land Speed.
